reviews.rationale: Eyebrow-specific items such as brow gels, pencils, microblading pens, brow powder, and brow tattoo stickers are as prominent as eyeliner and eyeshadow items. General makeup brush sets are a secondary but significant presence.
The cluster is consistently empty/refillable bottles, jars, lip gloss tubes, spray bottles, cosmetic pouches, and toiletry bags for storing or transporting beauty products.

This cluster has no coherent dominant category. Samples include electronics, phone cases, puzzles, pet clothing, hearing aid filters, face masks, foam hair rollers, hair shears, a corn planer, and perfume.
Human hair bundles, tape-ins, clip-ins, lace closures, and toppers dominate, but crochet braids, passion twists, and jumbo braiding hair are also a prominent subgroup.
notable_outliers_or_subgroups: crochet and passion twist braiding hair

reviews.rationale: Samples are heat or heatless tools for curling, straightening, diffusing, or volumizing hair, including curling irons, flat irons, dryer brushes, rollers, perm rods, and diffusers.
Samples cover shampoos, conditioners, leave-in treatments, detanglers, styling creams, hair oils, hairsprays, and hair thickening fibers.
Samples are almost entirely nail products, including polish, gel polish, false nail tips, nail art brushes, stamping kits, wraps, files, and an electric nail drill.
Claw clips, barrettes, bobby pins, and scrunchies dominate, but the cluster also includes bun makers, rhinestone pins, crab clips, and magic stretch combs.
notable_outliers_or_subgroups: micro rings and beads for extensions

reviews.rationale: Headbands of many styles are the clear majority, including knotted, turban, padded, boho, sports, beaded, and LED styles. Shower caps are recurring but secondary.
notable_outliers_or_subgroups: softball hair ties and sport headbands

reviews.rationale: False strip lashes dominate, but professional individual lash extensions, extension remover, extension tape, and eyelash perm lotion form a distinct salon-supply subgroup.
Facial products are the majority, but body lotion, body emulsion, foot peel masks, and body moisturizer are present. A broader skincare label better fits the sample.
Facial wipes, makeup remover cloths, cleansing brushes, blackhead tools, and nose strips are core, while rollers, steamers, and massagers extend the cluster into skincare tools.
notable_outliers_or_subgroups: body back scrubber and dry brushing gloves

reviews.rationale: The cluster consistently contains lace front wigs, headband wigs, synthetic wigs, human hair wigs, short afro wigs, costume wigs, and wig stands or hangers.
Shavers, shaving heads, razor blades, trimmers, and shaving kits form one subgroup, while water flossers, toothbrushes, toothbrush accessories, and dental scalers form another prominent subgroup.
Perfumes and eau de toilette products are the majority, with deodorant as a smaller secondary group. Several non-fragrance items lower confidence.
Soaps, hand washes, body washes, shower gels, shampoo bars, foaming cleansers, and bath bombs are the consistent core.
Lip products, eyeshadow palettes, mascara, setting powder, contour palettes, brow chalk, and makeup sets dominate the sample.
Body lotions, tanning lotions, body oils, and body creams are the largest subgroup, but the cluster is genuinely mixed. A broader label avoids overclaiming precision.
Temporary body tattoos make up about half the sample, while nail art stickers, foil transfers, decals, and wraps form a distinct co-prominent subgroup.
Detangling brushes, afro combs, hair combs, styling brushes, beard combs, and round barrel brushes dominate consistently.
notable_outliers_or_subgroups: hair coloring tint brush and comb set
barber cape and neck duster set
beard oil and comb gift kit
